meta.description: Antoine Steyer's portfolio — Full Stack engineer and Front-End developer passionate about user experience.

home.title: Hi, I'm Antoine 👦🏻
home.intro1: I'm {age} years old, I currently live in Valence (France), but I'm originally from Savoie.
home.intro2: Trained as an engineer in Human-Computer Interaction, I work mostly on Front-End development, with a particular focus on web accessibility. I strive to design inclusive, intuitive and performant interfaces, built for everyone.

contact.title: Let's stay in touch! 📫
contact.intro: Whether you just want to say hi or you'd like to work with me, feel free to drop me a line by email or on one of the networks below. I'd be glad to chat!

email.label: Email
email.funnyCatchPhrase: I check my inbox every day

linkedin.label: LinkedIn
linkedin.funnyCatchPhrase: Please don't send me a soulless boilerplate message

curious.title: Curious
curious.description: about new technologies and the evolution of major web frameworks; I also care deeply about the ergonomics and accessibility of apps and websites.

rigorous.title: Rigorous
rigorous.description: in my code and my organisation, I regularly read up on development best practices. Do Less, Better!

collaborative.title: Collaborative
collaborative.description: comfortable working in a team, I enjoy sharing what I know and learning from others through code reviews and pair programming.

Master's in Computer Science & Engineering (IFI), apprenticeship track

polytechAnnecy.label: PeiP - Computer Science track
polytechAnnecy.intro: Preparatory cycle for the Polytech engineering schools.
